videos.title: What's In My Carry-On Travel Bag? | 2024
videos.description:
I basically lived at the airport/airplane this year... almost 50 flights!! Throughout 2024, I mastered packing and learned what I NEED on the flight. So here is an updated "What's In My Carry-On Travel Bag" for you all to enjoy. What's something you can't fly without?

videos.title: Books I Read in 2024
videos.description:
I got to read a lot of books in 2024. This year, I was on over forty flights and since reading is my favorite airplane activity, I got to read hours and hours worth. Here are the 10 books I read this year:

videos.description:

videos.title: 👜 shopping in seoul • KOREA'S "IT BAG" (fall 2023)
videos.description:
Let's go shopping in Seoul! I've been wanting to start this series for some time now (what should I title it?). There are so many cool contemporary Korean fashion brands that I want to share with yall. So I hope you enjoy this!

Huge shoutouts to W Concept US for arranging this. Most stores don't allow filming so I am so grateful for this opportunity! Let me know which brand you want me to cover next :)
